# beget_postgresql_db (Resource)

PostgreSQL database within a managed PostgreSQL service. Manages databases with owner role and optional description.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_postgresql_configurations" "cfg" {
  version = "16.4"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "PostgreSQL Terraform"
  description      = "PostgreSQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_postgresql_configurations.cfg.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_postgresql_role" "app" {
  service_id = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  role_name  = "myapp"
  password   = "Secure_Password_123!"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_db" "app_db" {
  service_id = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  db_name    = "myapp_db"
  owner      = beget_postgresql_role.app.role_name
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_postgresql_configurations" "cfg" {
  version = "16.4"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "PostgreSQL Terraform"
  description      = "PostgreSQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_postgresql_configurations.cfg.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_postgresql_role" "app" {
  service_id = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  role_name  = "myapp"
  password   = "Secure_Password_123!"
}

resource "beget_postgresql_db" "app_db" {
  service_id  = beget_postgresql_service.main.id
  db_name     = "myapp_db"
  owner       = beget_postgresql_role.app.role_name
  description = "Application database for myapp"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `db_name` (String) Database name. Changing this recreates the resource.
- `owner` (String) Owner role name (must exist in the service). Changing this recreates the resource.
- `service_id` (String) PostgreSQL service ID (from beget_postgresql_service). Changing this recreates the resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the database.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (service_id/db_name).
- `size` (String) Database size as reported by the service.
